name: RESTOR mTOR inhibitor older-adults registry
summary: Recruiting randomized double-masked early phase 1 PK/PD trial of rapamycin and everolimus in healthy adults aged 65 to 90, designed to identify dosing that safely inhibits mTOR to levels seen in young healthy persons.
population: Community-dwelling healthy older adults aged 65 to 90 years

trial_details.expected_results_window: The registry listed estimated primary and study completion in July 2028 and had no posted results in the June 11, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: Recruiting no-results PK/PD and dose-timing context.
trial_details.why_it_matters: RESTOR directly targets a central Rapalogs uncertainty: whether rapamycin or everolimus can safely produce interpretable mTOR inhibition in older human tissues with sex-appropriate dosing.
